package rulecoverage

func PositivePaginationValidationMissingSharedBoundHelper() string {
    ruleID := "pagination_validation_missing_shared_bound_helper"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "API modules that hand-roll page and page-size bounds in many handlers instead of a shared contract."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
